data.title: As Elon Musk Goes Full Throttle For Trump, Democratic Congressman Says Party Missed A Trick By Alienating The Billionaire: 'We Should Have Celebrated His Contribution'
data.description: The Democratic party missed to acknowledge or appreciate Elon Musk and his accomplishments, says a congressman from the party.

data.title: S&P Settles At Record High As Apple, Amazon Shares Surge: Investor Optimism Improves Ahead Of Inflation Data
Amazon To Deploy AI-Powered Package Identifying Tech On 1000 Rivian Delivery Vans For Faster Deliveries
data.description: Amazon will deploy 1000 of its Rivian-manufactured electric delivery cans with a new AI-powered solution to help its delivery assistants spot the right package and save time per delivery.

data.title: As Elon Musk Gears Up For Highly Anticipated Robotaxi Unveil, This Ridesharing Network's Autonomous Driving Plans Could Put Pressure On Tesla's Amibitions
data.description: As the race to dominate the robotaxi sector intensifies, Uber is leveraging its extensive ridesharing network to compete against Tesla and Waymo.

data.title: Asia Gains, Europe Dips While Crude Oil Surges On Supply Risk - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets closed higher on Wed, driven by Fed meeting minutes showing support for rate cut. Tech stocks mixed, Google parent down 1.5%. Asian markets mostly up.
